name: Pickled Green Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green peppers and remove the seeds.
2. Slice the peppers and pack them into pint-sized canning jars, adding 2 to 3 cloves of garlic, 2 bay leaves, and 1/2 teaspoon of salt to each jar.
3. Bring a mixture of water and vinegar (half-and-half) to a boil.
4. Carefully pour the boiling liquid into the jars.
5. Seal the jars immediately.
